steps.title: Recognize vertical angles at line m
steps.content: At the intersection of the transversal and line m, angles $x$ and $y$ are vertical angles (opposite each other). Vertical angles are equal, so $x = y$.

steps.title: Solve for k
steps.content: Set the two expressions equal:$$6k + 13 = 8k - 29$$Rearrange and solve:$$13 + 29 = 8k - 6k$$$$42 = 2k$$$$k = 21$$

steps.title: Use co-interior angles to find z
steps.content: Angles $x$ and $z$ are co-interior angles (same-side interior angles) formed by the transversal crossing parallel lines $m$ and $n$. Co-interior angles are supplementary, so:$$x + z = 180°$$$$139° + z = 180°$$$$z = 41°$$That matches choice C — C is correct.
